requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Turkmenistan State Fire Authority and IEC 63056 / NFPA 855 Direction
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——土库曼斯坦国家消防主管机关及IEC 63056 / NFPA 855方向
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——土庫曼斯坦國家消防主管機關及IEC 63056 / NFPA 855方向

summary.en: Turkmenistan's fire safety authority operates under the Ministry of Internal Affairs. All commercial, industrial, and energy-sector facilities — including grid-connected BESS installations — require fire safety design approval and installation inspection from the state fire authority before commissioning. No publicly confirmed adoption of NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) or IEC 63056 (Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety) as a mandatory BESS fire-installation standard has been identified from official Turkmenistan sources as of the dataset date; this is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with Turkmenistan's fire authority and the Turkmenenergo project team before project design is finalised. For international project specifications and EPC contractors working in Turkmenistan, NFPA 855 and IEC 63056 are the internationally dominant references for BESS fire-safety installation design. Thermal-runaway propagation risk is acutely elevated in Turkmenistan's extreme desert climate, where ambient temperatures above 45 °C accelerate battery degradation and thermal-runaway onset — making fire-safety thermal management documentation a critical project deliverable beyond standard IEC or NFPA baseline requirements. BESS containers and enclosures should be rated for extreme ambient conditions and validated for gas detection, suppression system performance, and ventilation at local temperature extremes.
summary.zh: 土库曼斯坦消防安全主管机关隶属于内政部。所有商业、工业和能源领域设施——包括并网BESS装置——在投入使用前均须取得国家消防主管机关的消防安全设计审批和安装检查。截至本数据集日期，尚未从土库曼斯坦官方来源确认NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）或IEC 63056（电化学储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）作为强制性BESS消防安装标准的正式采用；这是一个高优先级差距，须在项目设计最终确定前直接向土库曼斯坦消防主管机关和Turkmenenergo项目团队核实。对于在土库曼斯坦工作的国际项目规格和EPC承包商，NFPA 855和IEC 63056是BESS消防安全安装设计的国际主导参考规范。在土库曼斯坦极端沙漠气候（环境温度超过45°C会加速电池老化和热失控触发）下，热失控蔓延风险显著升高——使消防安全热管理文件成为超出IEC或NFPA基准要求的关键项目交付物。BESS集装箱和机柜应达到极端环境条件额定值，并在当地极端温度下对气体探测、抑制系统性能和通风进行验证。
summary.zht: 土庫曼斯坦消防安全主管機關隸屬於內政部。所有商業、工業和能源領域設施——包括併網BESS裝置——在投入使用前均須取得國家消防主管機關的消防安全設計審批和安裝檢查。截至本數據集日期，尚未從土庫曼斯坦官方來源確認NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）或IEC 63056（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）作為強制性BESS消防安裝標準的正式採用；這是一個高優先級差距，須在項目設計最終確定前直接向土庫曼斯坦消防主管機關和Turkmenenergo項目團隊核實。對於在土庫曼斯坦工作的國際項目規格和EPC承包商，NFPA 855和IEC 63056是BESS消防安全安裝設計的國際主導參考規範。在土庫曼斯坦極端沙漠氣候（環境溫度超過45°C會加速電池老化和熱失控觸發）下，熱失控蔓延風險顯著升高——使消防安全熱管理文件成為超出IEC或NFPA基準要求的關鍵項目交付物。BESS集裝箱和機櫃應達到極端環境條件額定值，並在當地極端溫度下對氣體探測、抑制系統性能和通風進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: Turkmenistan Ministry of Internal Affairs — state fire authority; fire-safety design approval and installation inspection required before commissioning for all commercial/industrial/energy-sector facilities

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; formal adoption in Turkmenistan unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with fire authority)

IEC 63056:2020 — Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety (system-level safety and fire-related requirements expected in international project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in Turkmenenergo project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — cell/module safety including thermal runaway provisions (prerequisite for project-level fire safety review)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. GB/T 42288-2022 (Safety Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations) provides fire-protection requirements for BESS installations at the station level, including fire suppression and detection. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Turkmenistan's fire authority as equivalent to internationally accepted fire-safety requirements. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation must be supplemented with IEC 63056-aligned design documentation and NFPA 855-aligned installation design for international project review in Turkmenistan. Additionally, standard Chinese thermal test conditions do not replicate Turkmenistan's extreme ambient temperatures; supplementary high-temperature thermal abuse and propagation testing documentation will be required by international EPC contractors.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。GB/T 42288-2022（电化学储能电站安全技术规程）为站级BESS装置提供消防保护要求，包括消防抑制和探测。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被土库曼斯坦消防主管机关认可为与国际公认消防安全要求等效。中国BESS消防安全文件须在土库曼斯坦国际项目审查中补充符合IEC 63056的设计文件及符合NFPA 855的安装设计。此外，中国标准热测试条件未复现土库曼斯坦极端环境温度；国际EPC承包商将要求补充高温热滥用和蔓延测试文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。GB/T 42288-2022（電化學儲能電站安全技術規程）為站級BESS裝置提供消防保護要求，包括消防抑制和探測。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被土庫曼斯坦消防主管機關認可為與國際公認消防安全要求等效。中國BESS消防安全文件須在土庫曼斯坦國際項目審查中補充符合IEC 63056的設計文件及符合NFPA 855的安裝設計。此外，中國標準熱測試條件未複現土庫曼斯坦極端環境溫度；國際EPC承包商將要求補充高溫熱濫用和蔓延測試文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 42288-2022 — 电化学储能电站安全技术规程 (Safety Technical Regulations for Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations — station-level fire suppression and detection requirements)

gap.en: Gap: Turkmenistan fire authority approval is a mandatory project gate for all commercial and industrial BESS installations. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Turkmenistan's fire authority requirements and does not satisfy NFPA 855 or IEC 63056 standards expected by international project specifications. A Turkmenistan-specific critical gap beyond the Qatar parallel is the extreme desert climate: ambient temperatures regularly above 45 °C in summer significantly elevate thermal-runaway risk and require dedicated thermal abuse and propagation documentation at elevated ambient conditions — which standard Chinese test programmes (at 25 °C baseline) do not cover. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with Turkmenistan's fire authority and the Turkmenenergo project team the applicable fire installation standard (including whether NFPA 855 or IEC 63056 is required) and any Turkmenistan-specific requirements; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 and IEC 63056 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection, ventilation design validated at extreme ambient (above 45 °C), suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) provide supplementary high-temperature derating and thermal propagation test data demonstrating system safety at Turkmenistan ambient conditions; (d) engage a fire protection engineer with experience in CIS/Central Asia energy projects for design review and application submission.
gap.zh: 差距：土库曼斯坦消防主管机关审批是所有商业及工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足土库曼斯坦消防主管机关要求，也不满足国际项目规格所预期的NFPA 855或IEC 63056标准。与卡塔尔案例相比，土库曼斯坦特有的关键差距是极端沙漠气候：夏季环境温度通常超过45°C，显著提高热失控风险，并要求在高环境温度条件下提供专项热滥用和蔓延文件——中国标准测试程序（以25°C为基准）未涵盖此内容。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向土库曼斯坦消防主管机关和Turkmenenergo项目团队确认适用消防安装标准（包括是否要求NFPA 855或IEC 63056）及任何土库曼斯坦专项要求；（b）准备符合NFPA 855和IEC 63056要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测、在极端环境（超过45°C）验证的通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）提供补充性高温降额和热蔓延测试数据，证明系统在土库曼斯坦环境条件下的安全性；（d）聘请具有独联体/中亚能源项目经验的消防工程师进行设计审查和申请提交。
gap.zht: 差距：土庫曼斯坦消防主管機關審批是所有商業及工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足土庫曼斯坦消防主管機關要求，也不滿足國際項目規格所預期的NFPA 855或IEC 63056標準。與卡達案例相比，土庫曼斯坦特有的關鍵差距是極端沙漠氣候：夏季環境溫度通常超過45°C，顯著提高熱失控風險，並要求在高環境溫度條件下提供專項熱濫用和蔓延文件——中國標準測試程序（以25°C為基準）未涵蓋此內容。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向土庫曼斯坦消防主管機關和Turkmenenergo項目團隊確認適用消防安裝標準（包括是否要求NFPA 855或IEC 63056）及任何土庫曼斯坦專項要求；（b）準備符合NFPA 855和IEC 63056要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測、在極端環境（超過45°C）驗證的通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）提供補充性高溫降額和熱蔓延測試數據，證明系統在土庫曼斯坦環境條件下的安全性；（d）聘請具有獨聯體/中亞能源項目經驗的消防工程師進行設計審查和申請提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Turkmenistan fire authority approval required before commissioning of all commercial/industrial/energy BESS facilities; applicable fire installation standard (NFPA 855 / IEC 63056 / domestic regulation) unconfirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with fire authority and Turkmenenergo project team
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) — NFPA 855 Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (international reference; Turkmenistan adoption status unconfirmed — verify with fire authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Turkmenistan fire authority approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy international NFPA 855 or IEC 63056 requirements expected in Turkmenenergo and EPC project specifications. A Turkmenistan-specific critical risk is the extreme desert climate: ambient temperatures above 45 °C significantly elevate thermal-runaway and fire propagation risk, requiring supplementary high-temperature thermal abuse, derating, and propagation documentation beyond standard Chinese test conditions. Engage Turkmenistan's fire authority and a fire protection engineer with CIS/Central Asia experience at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire installation code and climate-specific design requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 土库曼斯坦消防主管机关审批是商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足Turkmenenergo和EPC项目规格所预期的NFPA 855或IEC 63056国际要求。土库曼斯坦特有的关键风险是极端沙漠气候：环境温度超过45°C显著提高热失控和火灾蔓延风险，须提供超出中国标准测试条件的补充性高温热滥用、降额和蔓延文件。在项目最早阶段与土库曼斯坦消防主管机关及具有独联体/中亚经验的消防工程师接触，确认适用消防安装规范和气候专项设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 土庫曼斯坦消防主管機關審批是商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足Turkmenenergo和EPC項目規格所預期的NFPA 855或IEC 63056國際要求。土庫曼斯坦特有的關鍵風險是極端沙漠氣候：環境溫度超過45°C顯著提高熱失控和火災蔓延風險，須提供超出中國標準測試條件的補充性高溫熱濫用、降額和蔓延文件。在項目最早階段與土庫曼斯坦消防主管機關及具有獨聯體/中亞經驗的消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防安裝規範和氣候專項設計要求。
